title: Senior People Operations Specialist
summary: Senior People Operations Specialist with 8 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include LinkedIn Recruiter, Recruitment, Performance Management, HR Analytics.
